title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Lenskart Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Lenskart Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lenskart Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About Lenskart Digital Technologies:
Lenskart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenskart Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
